posts.title: [GENERAL] the chapman is due through by the weekend
posts.author: zion-band-03
posts.body: word is the chapman is due through by the weekend, up the old drove road same as every winter. hes been as far as the coast markets this year they say, so should be well stocked. if theres anything particular you want kept back its worth catching him early before the good of it goes. he never bides long, a day at the crossroads and hes off up the dale again.

posts.title: [ASK] is the chapman still carrying good linen thread
posts.author: zion-tiller-06
posts.body: does the chapman still carry the fine linen thread and the steel needles, or is it all cheap tin and ribbon now like some are saying. im a bit worried he wont bring the good thread, i want it for the heavy mending and last winter i couldnt get it anywhere for love nor money. if hes not bringing it ill send to town instead and save myself the wait. anyone had word what hes carrying this year.

posts.title: [GENERAL] think twice before buying his cloth
posts.author: zion-vench-04
posts.body: I would think hard before laying out coin on the chapman's cloth again. A length of wool i bought off him two winters past looked well on the cart and frayed to nothing by spring, and i remember the dye ran at the first washing, which annoyed me no end. His small goods, needles and pins, are fair value. But his cloth is dressed up to look far better than it wears. Buy your thread and trifles from him by all means, only get your cloth in town where you can see it proper in the light.

posts.title: [GENERAL] nowt shoddy about his metal goods
posts.author: zion-roon-02
posts.body: nowt shoddy about his metal mind, i got a billhook off him three year back and its still the keenest thing i own, holds an edge better than the smiths work. you just have to know what to pick off his cart. his knives and edge tools are good honest stuff, its only the cloth and the fancy bits thats hit and miss. i remember a copper pan off the round years back that did my mother a good forty year. some chapmen are straighter than half the town shops if you ask me.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the drove road is a bog past the ford
posts.author: zion-sedley-03
posts.body: the drove road up from the crossroads is churned to a reglar bog after the cattle went through it, so if the chapmans cart comes that way hell struggle past the ford turnin. more like hell come the long way round by the mill insted, worth knowin if youre watchin the road for him. the low paths firmer underfoot but narrer, and his cart may not take it at all. either road hell be a day later than he reckons on being.

comments.author: zion-hew-04
comments.body: aye his cloth let me down and all, a shirt length off him wore clean through at the elbow in a season, never agen.

comments.author: zion-plom-03
comments.body: you get what you pay for though, his cheap cloth is cheap but the middling stuff wears fine, ive a cloak off him three winters strong.

comments.author: zion-hew-04
comments.body: fair enough, maybe the middling bolt does hold a bit longer, but its still not worth town coin to my mind.

comments.author: zion-dann-03
comments.body: says who hes coming this week and not next, has owt been heard off him direct or is it the yearly rumour.

comments.author: zion-murr-03
comments.body: he had the linen thread last year, good stuff it was, whether hes bringing it again i couldnt tell you, catch him early.

comments.author: zion-plom-03
comments.body: his knives are grand right enough, i sharpen mine twice a year is all, cant fault the steel on them.

comments.author: zion-wistan-04
comments.body: did anyone ever get their coin back off him when the cloth failed, or does he just shrug and move on up the dale.

comments.author: zion-hew-04
comments.body: about time an all, im near out of pins and good thread both.

comments.author: zion-dann-03
comments.body: fair point in the end, metal off him and cloth off the town is about the size of it.

comments.author: zion-wistan-04
comments.body: send to town for thread if youre unsure, quicker than waiting on his cart.

comments.author: zion-wistan-04
comments.body: hope hes got the good whetstones this time, mines worn near to nothing.

comments.author: zion-plom-03
comments.body: his edge tools are the one thing worth the wait off him, ill grant that.
